metadata.title: Star Wars Clone Wars - Sketchfab Model Reference (Real Verified IDs)
metadata.use_case: DINOForge warfare mod pack - Clone Wars era total conversion
metadata.notes: All model IDs verified via Sketchfab search. Covers v0.7.0 (5 models), v0.8.0 (4 models), v0.9.0+ (3 models)

v0_7_0_critical.name: General Grievous
v0_7_0_critical.author: esdalex115
v0_7_0_critical.notes: CIS Hero - Both factions need heroes for v0.7.0

v0_7_0_critical.name: Clone Trooper Phase II (Shiny Updated)
v0_7_0_critical.author: Marr Velz
v0_7_0_critical.notes: Core Republic unit - Phase II shiny armor

v0_7_0_critical.name: AT-TE Walker (Animated)
v0_7_0_critical.author: R3negadeAidan
v0_7_0_critical.notes: Fix AT-TE mapping - currently uses V-19 Torrent (wrong model)

v0_7_0_critical.name: Jedi Temple (Coruscant)
v0_7_0_critical.author: Owen Cornelius
v0_7_0_critical.notes: First building model - Republic HQ, v0.7.0 target

v0_7_0_critical.name: B2 Super Battle Droid
v0_7_0_critical.author: zakeriiino
v0_7_0_critical.notes: Elite CIS droid - blue heavy unit

v0_8_0_elite.name: Phase 2 Clone Trooper (Alternative)
v0_8_0_elite.author: Z.Dot
v0_8_0_elite.notes: Alternative Clone model for variety - based on DICE original, improved

v0_8_0_elite.name: Clone ARC Trooper
v0_8_0_elite.author: Goldermor
v0_8_0_elite.notes: Elite clone armor - v0.8 expansion for unit variety

v0_8_0_elite.name: Droideka (Shield Droid)
v0_8_0_elite.author: PokCat
v0_8_0_elite.notes: Rolling sphere droid with blasters - distinctive CIS unit

v0_8_0_elite.name: AAT (Armored Assault Tank)
v0_8_0_elite.author: Mind Mulch for The Masses
v0_8_0_elite.notes: CIS tank - excellent for real-time rendering, low polygon

v0_9_0_future.name: B1 Battle Droid
v0_9_0_future.notes: No free CC-BY-4.0 models found yet - may need commissioned asset or manual modeling

v0_9_0_future.name: Geonosis Arena (Environment)
v0_9_0_future.notes: Optional environmental asset for map variations - lower priority

v0_9_0_future.name: LAAT/i Gunship (Republic Air Support)
v0_9_0_future.notes: Optional air support unit - lower priority, not core to ground RTS

download_instructions.automation: Run scripts/download_priority_assets.py with SKETCHFAB_TOKEN env var
download_instructions.manual: Visit sketchfab_url and click 'Download' → select 'FBX' or 'GLB' format
download_instructions.extraction: Script auto-extracts FBX from ZIP → place in packs/warfare-starwars/assets/raw/{asset_id}/
download_instructions.attribution: CC-BY-4.0 requires author credit when published
